etymology.description: Depicts a hat -> original form of 帽(帽) (mào, "hat")
etymology.interpretation: 冃(mào) originally depicted a hat and is the basis for the character 帽(帽), meaning 'hat.' Over time, 目(目) (mù, "eye") and 巾(巾) (jīn, "cloth") were added to specify the meaning more clearly in the character 帽(帽).
